body.content:
The Events Team of the Faction Hub has initiated a brand new competition: A **short film competition**! Through the films, members of the community may team up with each other, using their existing knowledge on the game and the SCP universe to create the **best** videos possible!

Participants are encouraged to go the extra mile in these films, editing and adding music to the RAW films in order to __polish__ and __elevate__ them to the next level!

items: Films must be made within the **time of the event message being posted** and the **submission date**
Teams must have between **1 to 8 people**
Films must be made within **SCP: Roleplay**
Each team may only submit **one** film

body.content: What would be a competition without its prizes? The Faction Hub Events Team has very kindly offered a  ***__1750 Robux__*** prize pool for our winners!

🥇First Place - **1000 Robux** + Event Winner role
🥈Second Place - **500 Robux**
🥉Third Place - **250 Robux**
Interested? Click on the button below for more information regarding the competition! Hope to see you there!
